posts.author: Eugene (Eugene Jones)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

It’s Eugene from Relokia company.

From time to time we are getting requests from customers to migrate projects, tasks and related data from PM systems to Monday.com.

So I thought our automatic tool might be interested at this place too.
You can book a call with us https://project-management.relokia.com/ or get in touch over the email contact@relokia.com, if you’d need help to migrate your data.
